ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the user's personal or business website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media file attached to the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (image, video, text) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hashtag was first used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_hashtags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text content of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (like, comment, follow) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the follow relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_categories" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the post */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Calculated engagement rate (likes + comments + shares) / views */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings for the user */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings for the user */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if email notifications are enabled */,
  "push_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if push notifications are enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocked_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blocked user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was blocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "blocked_user_id")
)
